Our Story

A Family Run
Catering Company

Truly Scrumptious is owned and run by Jamie Forbes — a passion project turned profession, built on the belief that great food brings people together.

Every menu is crafted with fresh, seasonal ingredients and served with genuine care. No two events are the same, and we love it that way.

"Good food is about more than the meal — it's the moments it creates."
Our Story

Planning an Event?

Tell us about your event and we will help create the perfect menu for your occasion.
